links.title: Valot
links.tooltip: View light switch status by floor

targets.query:
from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "hotwater_temp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "supply_temp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "runtime")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "runtime_compressor")
  |> spread()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "runtime")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "runtime_3kw")
  |> spread()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "runtime")
  |> spread()
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_stop"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "outdoor_temp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "return_temp")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "runtime")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "runtime_hotwater")
  |> spread()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "runtime")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "runtime_6kw")
  |> spread()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "performance")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "integral")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "setting")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "integral_limit_a1" or r._field == "integral_limit_a2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * -1.0}))

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "compressor" or r._field == "brinepump" or r._field == "flowlinepump" or r._field == "hotwater_production" or r._field == "aux_heater_3kw" or r._field == "aux_heater_6kw")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "hotwater_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "setting")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "hotwater_start_temp" or r._field == "hotwater_stop_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "supply_temp" or r._field == "return_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.supply_temp and exists r.return_temp)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: 1.965 * (r.supply_temp - r.return_temp), _field: "thermal_power"}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "aux_heater_3kw" or r._field == "aux_heater_6kw")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.aux_heater_3kw and exists r.aux_heater_6kw)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: 3.0 * float(v: r.aux_heater_3kw) + 6.0 * float(v: r.aux_heater_6kw), _field: "aux_power"}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "supply_temp" or r._field == "return_temp" or r._field == "supply_target_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "alarm")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "alarm_outdoor_sensor" or r._field == "alarm_supply_sensor" or r._field == "alarm_return_sensor" or r._field == "alarm_hotwater_sensor")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "alarm")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "alarm_highpr_pressostate" or r._field == "alarm_lowpr_pressostate" or r._field == "alarm_motor_breaker" or r._field == "alarm_low_flow_brine" or r._field == "alarm_low_temp_brine" or r._field == "alarm_3phase_order" or r._field == "alarm_overheating")
  |> last()

temps = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "supply_temp" or r._field == "return_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.supply_temp and exists r.return_temp)

status = from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "compressor" or r._field == "aux_heater_3kw" or r._field == "aux_heater_6kw")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.compressor and exists r.aux_heater_3kw and exists r.aux_heater_6kw)

join(tables: {temps: temps, status: status}, on: ["_time"])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.compressor == 1)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, hp_cop: 1.965 * (r.supply_temp - r.return_temp) / 2.3, system_cop: (1.965 * (r.supply_temp - r.return_temp) + 3.0 * float(v: r.aux_heater_3kw) + 6.0 * float(v: r.aux_heater_6kw)) / (2.3 + 3.0 * float(v: r.aux_heater_3kw) + 6.0 * float(v: r.aux_heater_6kw))}))

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "supply_temp" or r._field == "return_temp" or r._field == "brine_in_temp" or r._field == "brine_out_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> fill(usePrevious: true)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_field", "_value"])
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.supply_temp and exists r.return_temp and exists r.brine_in_temp and exists r.brine_out_temp)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, heating_dt: r.supply_temp - r.return_temp, brine_dt: r.brine_in_temp - r.brine_out_temp}))

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "alarm")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field != "alarm_indoor_sensor")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "indoor_temp" or r._field == "indoor_target_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "outdoor_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "brine_in_temp" or r._field == "brine_out_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pressurepipe_temp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "building_automation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "thermia" and r.data_type == "performance")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "demand1" or r._field == "demand2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
